title: Paragymnopteris sargentii
taxonomy: Paragymnopteris sargentii is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. It belongs to the genus Paragymnopteris. The family Thelypteridaceae is a part of the order Polypodiales. This order is a subclass of the class Polypodiopsida. The class Polypodiopsida is a division of the kingdom Plantae.
